name: od-social-card
title: Social card (default scenario)
description: Default scenario plugin for platform-ready social cards, carousels, covers, threads, stories, and launch visuals, upgraded with Guizang editorial/Swiss seeds and bundled visual assets.

query.en: Create platform-ready social design for {{audience}}. Platform: {{platform}}. Layout: {{layout}}. Content brief: {{content}}. Palette direction: {{palette}}. Use {{designSystem}} as brand direction. Read `assets/template.html`, choose Editorial or Swiss via `references/layouts.md`, then copy `assets/template-editorial-card.html` or `assets/template-swiss-card.html` as the seed. Use supplied images/screenshots or bundled `assets/screenshot-backgrounds/` so the output is not a purely abstract poster. Export static frames with strong typography and crop-safe composition.
query.zh-CN: 为 {{audience}} 创建可发布的社媒设计。平台：{{platform}}。版式：{{layout}}。内容简述：{{content}}。配色方向：{{palette}}。品牌方向使用 {{designSystem}}。先读 `assets/template.html`，再按 `references/layouts.md` 选择 Editorial 或 Swiss，并复制 `assets/template-editorial-card.html` 或 `assets/template-swiss-card.html` 作为种子。优先使用用户图片/截图，或使用内置 `assets/screenshot-backgrounds/`，避免做成纯抽象海报。输出可导出的静态画板，强调强排版和安全裁切。
query.zh-TW: 為 {{audience}} 建立可發布的社群設計。平台：{{platform}}。版式：{{layout}}。內容簡述：{{content}}。配色方向：{{palette}}。品牌方向使用 {{designSystem}}。先讀 `assets/template.html`，再按 `references/layouts.md` 選擇 Editorial 或 Swiss，並複製 `assets/template-editorial-card.html` 或 `assets/template-swiss-card.html` 作為種子。優先使用使用者圖片/截圖，或使用內建 `assets/screenshot-backgrounds/`，避免做成純抽象海報。輸出可匯出的靜態畫板，強調強排版和安全裁切。

inputs.name: content
inputs.label: Content brief
inputs.placeholder: launch note, hot take, data point, tutorial, quote

inputs.name: palette
inputs.label: Palette
inputs.placeholder: X monochrome, LinkedIn blue, editorial ink, brand palette

inputs.name: designSystem
inputs.label: Design system
inputs.placeholder: active design system or social editorial
